commands.repair_reason: Manual review is needed because the patch has blocking correctness/security findings and the external PR still needs real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor.; Needs attention: The diff touches unsafe subagent output handling and leaves a concrete bypass through the fallback assistant read.; Review finding: [P1] Move Telegram spawn policy out of core — src/channels/thread-bindings-policy... (sha=a860ec6a6481764cf7e067b2396d080996f4727c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds unsafe subagent announce-output filtering, fails persistent thread-bound session spawns without a routable deliveryOrigin, and special-cases Telegram as an automatic thread-bound spawn channel.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the new deliveryOrigin guard would return an error for existing main-branch tests that currently accept ready-without-origin thread-bound session paths; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the patch has blocking correctness/security findings and the external PR still needs real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor.

target.title: Fix subagent thread spawn safety
target.body:
## Summary
- prevent unsafe raw subagent/tool output from being surfaced in completion/timeout announces
- fail closed for persistent thread-bound subagent sessions when hook readiness lacks a routable delivery origin
- allow Telegram to opt into automatic thread-bound session spawn policy

## Tests
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/sessions-spawn-hooks.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.timeout.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.channels.config.ts src/channels/thread-bindings-policy.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check src/agents/subagent-announce-output.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.timeout.test.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.ts src/agents/sessions-spawn-hooks.test.ts src/channels/thread-bindings-policy.ts src/channels/thread-bindings-policy.test.ts`
target.author: svetznaniy33
